---
title: "Coding Sample: Escaping Inequality in India"
subtitle: "Selected Excerpts"
author: "Rishav Roy"
format: pdf
---

What follows are excerpts from the code appendix to my independent paper and writing sample, *Escaping Inequality in India: The Role of English-Medium Instruction*.

The next 25 pages illustrate data ingestion and harmonization, complex survey econometrics, IV estimation, and careful diagnostics: scalable Census/geospatial import, district-crosswalk QA, systematic missingness tests, survey-weighted probit estimation, AME derivation, cascading fuzzy record linkage, IV specification, and spatial diagnostics.
